name: marquee-additional

files.content:
Tailwind Config

To implement the `animate-marquee` class from your tailwind config, add the code below to your tailwind.config.js

module.exports = {
    theme: {
        extend: {
            // Add custom keyframes
            keyframes: {
                marquee: {
                    '0%': {
                        transform: 'translateX(0)'
                    },
                    '100%': {
                        transform: 'translateX(-100%)'
                    },
                },
            },
            // Add custom animations
            animation: {
                'marquee': 'marquee 20s linear infinite',
            },
        },
    },
    plugins: [],
}

visual_summary: A marquee component, used to display additional information like Tailwind Config. It features a header, a paragraph, and a preformatted code block with a code snippet. Typically used to show implementation details or instructions.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics: Name: marquee-additional Description: A marquee component, used to display additional information like Tailwind Config. It features a header, a paragraph, and a preformatted code block with a code snippet. Typically used to show implementation details or instructions. Style: light, textual, default Interactions: static Tags: marquee, additional, info, configuration Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // elements/marquee-additional.html
